# autobazar123

> Marketplace web app for vehicle listings, built with Next.js App Router, Supabase, Algolia, Stripe, and Cloudflare worker jobs.

## Overview

- [Project Playbook](/docs/PROJECT_PLAYBOOK.md): Single source of truth for architecture, security baseline, and operating policy.
- [Security Review](/SECURITY_REVIEW.md): Current security findings and hardening status.
- [SEO Matrix](/docs/seo-implementation-matrix.md): Implemented SEO work and evidence anchors.
- [Codex Workflow Checklist](/docs/codex-workflow-checklist.md): Agent workflow guardrails and verification commands.
- [Resource Adoption](/docs/codex-resource-adoption.md): Adopted external practices and enforcement.

## Setup

- Install dependencies: `npm ci`
- Start dev server: `npm run dev`
- Typecheck: `npx tsc --noEmit`
- Unit tests: `npm run test:unit`
- Lint: `npm run lint`

## Quality Gates

- Workflow guard: `npm run test:workflow-check`
- Codex CLI guard: `npm run test:codex-cli-check`
- Links ingestion test: `npm run test:links-ingest`
- Security release gate: `npm run test:security:release-gate`
- UI quality gate: `npm run test:ui-quality-gate`

## Key App Surfaces

- [Home page](/src/app/page.tsx)
- [Search results](/src/app/vysledky/page.tsx)
- [Listing detail](/src/app/auto/[id]/page.tsx)
- [Add listing wizard](/src/app/pridat-inzerat/page.tsx)
- [Dealer dashboard](/src/app/dealer/page.tsx)
- [Admin dashboard](/src/app/admin/page.tsx)

## Security And API

- [Proxy middleware and security headers](/src/proxy.ts)
- [CSP builder](/src/lib/security/csp.ts)
- [Rate limiting](/src/lib/ratelimit.ts)
- [Security policy checks](/scripts/security-release-gate.mjs)
- [Agent contract checks](/scripts/agent-contract-check.mjs)

## Programmatic SEO

- [Brand pages](/src/app/[brand]/page.tsx)
- [Model pages](/src/app/[brand]/[model]/page.tsx)
- [City pages](/src/app/[brand]/[model]/[city]/page.tsx)
- [Sitemap generation](/src/app/sitemap.ts)
- [Robots policy](/src/app/robots.ts)

## Analytics Governance

- [Event taxonomy](/src/lib/analytics/events.ts)
